meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. Use this advanced SaaS starter kit guide with Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade AI applications.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by shipping a production-grade SaaS starter kit. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you move beyond toy projects. This approach demonstrates architectural depth, security-first mindset, and the ability to deploy scalable, high-value AI solutions to the market.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank GitHub profile, the silence of your contributions graph screaming that you haven't shipped anything real. The tech industry doesn't care about your GPA; it cares about what you've deployed. You're trapped in the 'no portfolio' cycle where you need experience to get hired, but need a job to get experience.

It ends today. We are bypassing the junior-level 'to-do list' apps and jumping straight into enterprise-grade SaaS architecture. Using Antigravity and Claude Code, you will transform from a student into a builder who understands the full lifecycle of a scalable, AI-integrated application.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation using Antigravity to ensure your project is production-ready from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a SaaS boilerplate with Next.js 14, Supabase Auth, and Stripe integration. Include a clean folder structure for modular AI service layers.

steps.title: Database Schema Design
steps.description: Define your relational data model to handle user subscriptions and AI usage logs effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a SaaS app with users, subscriptions, and AI_usage_logs tables. Ensure index optimization for query performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'prisma generate && npx prisma db push'

steps.title: Integrating AI Middleware
steps.description: Implement a secure proxy layer to manage your LLM API calls, preventing credential leakage and managing rate limits.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an AI service layer in TypeScript that wraps OpenAI API calls with rate limiting and error handling middleware.

steps.title: Auth and Security Hardening
steps.description: Lock down your application with Row-Level Security (RLS) policies to ensure data isolation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Supabase RLS policies for the users and projects tables to ensure users can only access their own data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx supabase migration new secure_auth'

steps.title: Production Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Automate your CI/CD pipeline so that every push to main is tested, linted, and deployed to Vercel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for a Next.js project that runs linting, testing, and deployment to Vercel on push to main.

pro_tips: Always implement an AI usage tracker in your database; it demonstrates you understand the cost-per-token implications of production SaaS.
Use 'Environment Variable' abstraction layers to ensure your code is never coupled to specific provider keys.
Prioritize building a 'feedback loop' component where users can flag AI hallucinations; this shows you think about data quality.
Don't build your own auth; use industry-standard providers like Supabase or Clerk to prove you prioritize security over reinventing the wheel.
Include a 'system-architecture.md' file in your repo; recruiters love seeing high-level design documentation alongside your code.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, add a 'Case Study' README section explaining the technical challenges you overcame. Share your live URL on LinkedIn and tag the tools you used to attract recruiter attention.
content.conversion_block: You now have the blueprint to stop learning and start shipping. Don't let your code sit in a private repo—get it in front of users and build your reputation as an engineer who delivers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
